ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is the project manager */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client who commissioned the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each component (UUID) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the component belongs to */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "coordinate_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the component in meters */,
  "coordinate_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the component in meters */,
  "coordinate_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the component in meters */,
  "component_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the component */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the component was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the component (e.g., installed, pending, removed) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used for the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for the component */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the component in kilograms */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the component (e.g., '10x5x2') */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the component */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last modified the component data */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the component data was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_component_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("component_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "component_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type (e.g., structural, electrical, mechanical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent component type (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the component type is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_types_parent_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("component_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, engineer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" TEXT /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the component */,
  "component_id" TEXT /* ID of the component */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the component */,
  "coordinate_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the component in meters */,
  "coordinate_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the component in meters */,
  "coordinate_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the component in meters */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the component version was created */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the changes */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who approved the changes (if applicable) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the changes were approved (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
